records.ety: [OE. descolouren, OF. descolorer, F. dcolorer, fr. L. dis- + cololare, coloratum, to color, color color. See Color.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Discolored (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Discoloring.]

defs: To alter the natural hue or color of; to change to a different color; to stain; to tinge; as, a drop of wine will discolor water; silver is discolored by sea water.
To alter the true complexion or appearance of; to put a false hue upon.
